welcome.tagline:
Inama z'ibihingwa zinoze
zishingiye kuri AI n'amakuru y'ubutaka

login.subtitle:
Inama z'ibihingwa zinoze
kuri buri muhinzi
login.incorrectCredentials: Imeyili cyangwa ijambo ry'ibanga ntabwo ari byo

register.title: Fungura Konti
register.subtitle: Injira muri AgriVision uhinze neza
register.passwordTooShort: Ijambo ry'ibanga rigomba kuba nibura inyuguti 8

forgotPassword.subtitleEmail: Injiza imeyili yawe tuzoguhereza ikimenyetso cyo guhindura
forgotPassword.subtitleReset: Injiza ikimenyetso wagezeho n'ijambo ry'ibanga rishya
forgotPassword.passwordTooShort: Ijambo ry'ibanga rigomba kuba nibura inyuguti 8
forgotPassword.successMessage: Ijambo ry'ibanga ryahinduwe. Injira hifashishijwe ijambo ry'ibanga rishya.

home.labSoilSub: Shyira amakuru ya laboratoire mu buri bwoko
home.labSoilNote: Siga ubusa kugira ngo ukoreshe amakuru ya satelite.
home.locationRequiredMsg: AgriVision ikeneye aho uri kugira ngo ikurure amakuru y'ubutaka n'ikirere.
home.locationError: Gushakisha aho uri ntibyakunze. Ongera ugerageze.

history.title: Amateka
history.emptySubtitle: Inama z'ibihingwa zawe zaramaze guhabwa zizababyukira hano niba warasuzumye murima wawe.
history.disclaimer: Inama zishingiye kuri AI. Buri gihe ubaze inzobere mu buhinzi.

onboarding.slide1Desc: Inama z'ibihingwa zikoresheje AI n'amakuru y'ubutaka n'ikirere by'ukuri — yakozwe ku bahinzi b'u Rwanda.
onboarding.slide2Desc: Imashini yacu isesengura amakuru y'ubutaka avuye kuri satelite, ikirere cy'igihe, n'ahantu wawe kugirango igusabire ibihingwa byiza.
onboarding.slide3Desc: Bona amabwiriza arambuye yo gutera hamwe n'imikorere ikomeyeho ku gihingwa cyose cyasabwe.
onboarding.slide4Desc: Koresha AgriVision mu Cyongereza cyangwa Ikinyarwanda. Hindura igihe cyose mu mwirondoro wawe.

howItWorks.title: Uburyo Bikorwa
howItWorks.heroSub: Inama z'ibihingwa zikoresheje AI n'amakuru y'ukuri avuye kuri satelite n'ikirere
howItWorks.accuracySub: Yarindwa kuri sampulli 2,200 z'ubutaka ku bihingwa 22
howItWorks.step1Desc: Porogaramu isoma ahantu wawe neza hakoreshejwe GPS ya telephone yawe — nta makuru abazwa.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Azote, Fosifor, Potasiyumu, na pH biva kuri satelite ku hantu hawe neza biva kuri API ya iSDAsoil.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Ubushyuhe n'ubuhehere bw'igihe biva kuri OpenWeather, hamwe n'imvura y'igihembwe ivuye kuri NASA POWER.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Imashini ya Random Forest yarindwe kuri sampulli 2,200 yagira ibihingwa 3 byiza hamwe n'amanota y'icyizere.
howItWorks.step5Desc: Ibisubizo biringanizwa n'igihe cy'gutera, impamvu z'ubuhinzi, n'inama z'imbolea mu rurimi rwawe.
howItWorks.sourceIsda: Ikarita y'ubutaka kuri satelite kuri 30m — N, P, K, pH kuri Afurika yose
howItWorks.sourceOw: Ubushyuhe n'ubuhehere bw'igihe biva ku birindiro 40,000+ ku isi
howItWorks.sourceNasa: Amakuru y'imvura y'imyaka 30 avuye mu bubiko bw'ikirere cya NASA POWER
howItWorks.datasetNote: Imashini yarindwe kuri Dataset ya Crop Recommendation (Kaggle). Icyitonderwa: dataset ivuye India; inama zihurijwe n'ikirere cy'u Rwanda.

profile.title: Umwirondoro Wanjye
profile.name: Amazina Yose
profile.locationGranted: Uruhushya rwo kumenya aho uri ruratanzwe
profile.tokenSentMsg: Injiza ikimenyetso n'ijambo ry'ibanga rishya hano munsi.
profile.passwordChangedMsg: Ijambo ry'ibanga ryawe ryahinduwe. Injira nanone.
profile.passwordTooShort: Ijambo ry'ibanga rigomba kuba nibura inyuguti 8
profile.changePasswordHint: Tuzakohereza kode yo guhindura kuri imeyili yawe yanditswe.
profile.codeSentHint: Kode yoherejwe kuri imeyili yawe. Injiza hano hamwe n'ijambo ry'ibanga rishya.
profile.resetError: Kode itari yo cyangwa yarangiye. Gerageza nanone.

plantingSeasons.maize: Igihembwe A cyangwa B — tera mu ntangiriro y'imvura
plantingSeasons.kidneybeans: Igihembwe A cyangwa B — ubutaka bufite utuzimu bwiza
plantingSeasons.pomegranate: Biba mu mwaka wose — kimera nyuma y'amezi 5–7
plantingSeasons.banana: Biba mu mwaka wose — vuna nyuma y'amezi 9–12
plantingSeasons.mango: Tera mu ntangiriro y'imvura — kimera nyuma y'imyaka 3–5
plantingSeasons.grapes: Tera mu gihe cy'ubusumo — tema nyuma yo gusarura
plantingSeasons.apple: Tera mu gihe cy'ubushyuhe buto — bisaba klimati y'umusozi
plantingSeasons.orange: Biba mu mwaka wose — kimera nyuma y'imyaka 3–5
plantingSeasons.papaya: Biba mu mwaka wose — kimera nyuma y'amezi 6–9
plantingSeasons.coconut: Biba mu mwaka wose — bisaba akarere k'inyanja
plantingSeasons.cotton: Igihembwe A (Nzeli–Gashyantare) — bisaba gihe kirekire cy'ubusumo
plantingSeasons.coffee: Biba mu mwaka wose — imisozi y'u Rwanda ikunzwe

rice.requirements: Imirima ifuye · Ubushyuhe 22–32°C · pH 5.5–6.5 · Amazi menshi
steps: Fanana no gutegura umurima; wubake inkuta zo gutunga amazi ya 5–10 cm
Manura imbuto mu mazi amasaha 24, suka hanyuma tegereza iminsi 2–3 kugeza ibimera bigaragara
Terura inzuki z'ibyumweru 3–4, 20 cm zikurikiranye mu mirongo ya 25 cm
Shyira DAP mu gutera; ongeraho urea mu gihe cy'iterwa (ibyumweru 3–4)
Kuramo ibyatsi ku ibyumweru 2 na 6; witonde indwara ya blast n'uduti bwamaro
Nyuza umurima ibyumweru 2 mbere yo gusarura; sesa igihe 85% by'imbuto zitukutse
rice.tips: Igihembwe A (Nzeli–Gashyantare) gitanga umusaruro mwiza mu misozi y'u Rwanda.

maize.requirements: Ubutaka bwiza bwumye neza · Ubushyuhe 18–27°C · pH 5.8–7.0 · Imvura 500–800 mm
steps: Turuka ubutaka kugeza 30 cm hanyuma wongere ibiribwa biva mu giti
Tera imbuto 3 cm mu butaka, 30 cm zikurikiranye mu mirongo ya 75 cm
Shyira umote wa DAP (50 kg/ha) mu migezi mu gutera
Ongeraho CAN cyangwa urea igihe ibigori bigeze 30–40 cm uburebure
Kuramo ibyatsi ku ibyumweru 2 na 6 nyuma yo gutera
Witonde uduti bwa FAW; koresha insecticide nibisabwa; sesa igihe imifuriko irakaye
maize.tips: Hindura na ibishyimbo kugira ngo ugeze azote mu butaka no kugabanya ingaruka mbi.

chickpea.requirements: Ubutaka bworoshye bwumye neza · Ubushyuhe 15–25°C · pH 6.0–7.5 · Amazi make
steps: Tegura ubutaka bworoshye bwumye neza; irinde ahantu hafite amazi menshi
Manura imbuto na bagiteri ya Rhizobium kugira ngo zigeze azote mu kirere
Tera imbuto 5 cm mu butaka, 25 cm zikurikiranye mu mirongo ya 45 cm
Shyira umote w'fosifor mu gutera; irinde kongera azote nyinshi
Niza make cyane — pwa mato irhanganira ubusumo neza cyane
Witonde uduti bw'imitsi; koresha neem cyangwa insecticide yemewe
Sesa igihe imitsi iritukura iramvutse; fata, umeshe kugeza 10% bk'amazi
chickpea.tips: Itewe neza nyuma y'ibihingwa by'imyaka — igeza azote mu butaka.

kidneybeans.requirements: Ubutaka buryoshye bwumye neza · Ubushyuhe 16–24°C · pH 6.0–7.0 · Amazi yo hagati
steps: Tegura ubutaka bworoshye bwumye neza; irinde ubutaka bugari cyangwa bufite amazi
Tera imbuto 4 cm mu butaka, 20 cm zikurikiranye mu mirongo ya 60 cm
Shyira DAP nke (25 kg/ha) mu migezi mu gutera
Niza kenshi mu gihe cy'amabuye n'imitsi igura
Kuramo ibyatsi ku ibyumweru 2 na 5; shyira imisumba yo kubika amazi
Witonde uduti bw'imizi n'indwara ya angular leaf spot
Sesa igihe 90% by'imitsi ikaze kandi imbuto zikavugana mu mutsi
kidneybeans.tips: Hindura na ibigori buri gihembwe kugira ngo wirinde indwara z'ubutaka.

pigeonpeas.requirements: Ubwoko bwinshi bw'ubutaka · Ubushyuhe 18–38°C · pH 5.0–7.0 · Birhanganira ubuche cyane
steps: Ntukeneye gutegura ubutaka kenshi; kuramo ibyatsi hanyuma uguture ubutaka bw'hejuru
Tera imbuto 3 ku rwobo, 5 cm mu butaka, 60 cm zikurikiranye mu mirongo ya 1.5 m
Sisitamo 2 mu rwobo nyuma y'inzuki gusa
Shyira umote w'fosifor nke mu gutera
Niza mu ntangiriro gusa; ambaride irhanganira ubuche neza cyane
Genzura Maruca pod borer; koresha neem cyangwa insecticide yemewe
Sesa imitsi y'icyatsi kugira ngo ubone ibiryo cyangwa siga ikaze isabe
pigeonpeas.tips: Ikunzwe mu kurinda ubutaka ku misozi; ubwoko buhoraho buramara imyaka 3–5.

mothbeans.requirements: Ubutaka bwa m'ibyondo · Ubushyuhe 24–38°C · pH 6.0–7.5 · Imvura nke cyane
steps: Tegura ubutaka bworoshye bwa m'ibyondo; irinde ahantu hafite amazi cyangwa igicucu
Tera imbuto 3 cm mu butaka, 20 cm zikurikiranye mu mirongo ya 45 cm nyuma y'imvura y'imperuka
Ntukeneye umote kenshi — pwa nto irhanganira ubutaka butonze
Niza make cyane — igihingwa gikunda guhinga mu gihe cy'ubusumo bw'Igihembwe B
Kuramo ibyatsi rimwe gusa ku cyumweru cya 2; ikurura kuzima mu maguru masha
Witonde aphids n'indwara ya powdery mildew mu guhe cy'ubuhehere
Sesa igihe 70% by'imitsi yeze; tema ubwoko bw'ibimera ibyumye
mothbeans.tips: Ikoreshwa neza nk'igihingwa gikinga ubutaka mu gihe cy'ubusumo.

mungbean.requirements: Ubutaka bwiza bwumye neza · Ubushyuhe 25–35°C · pH 6.2–7.2 · Amazi yo hagati
steps: Tegura urutaka rworoshye rwumye neza
Tera imbuto 3 cm mu butaka, 15 cm zikurikiranye mu mirongo ya 45 cm
Shyira DAP nke (20 kg/ha) mu gutera
Niza buhoro buri minsi 5–7; irinde amazi menshi
Kuramo ibyatsi ku ibyumweru 2 na 4 nyuma yo gutera
Witonde yellow mosaic virus isakazwa na whitefly; genzura vuba
Sesa ukurikije imitsi yaka (inshuro 2–3 ku murima) mu minsi 60–90
mungbean.tips: Igihembwe gito gituma ikunzwa gutera hagati y'ibihembwe binini.

blackgram.requirements: Ubutaka bworoshye bwumye · Ubushyuhe 25–35°C · pH 6.0–7.0 · Ubushyuhe n'ubusumo
steps: Tegura ubutaka bworoshye bwumye neza; irinde ubutaka bugari n'ahantu hafite amazi
Tera imbuto 3–4 cm mu butaka, 20 cm zikurikiranye mu mirongo ya 45 cm
Shyira fosifor mu gutera; irinde azote — igihingwa kiyitera cyubwite
Niza buhoro rimwe ku cyumweru mu gihe cy'ubusumo bw'icyakabiri
Kuramo ibyatsi ku ibyumweru 2 na 5 nyuma yo gutera
Genzura uduti bw'imizi n'indwara ya yellow mosaic; kura ibimera birwaye
Sesa igihe 80% by'imitsi yituka; umeshe hanyuma usase
blackgram.tips: Igihingwa cy'indyo ikungahaye — gifasha mu mutekano w'ibiribwa no guteza imbere ubutaka.

lentil.requirements: Ubutaka bwiza bwumye · Ubushyuhe 7–27°C · pH 6.0–8.0 · Klimati y'umusozi utunutse
steps: Turuka no gutegura urutaka rworoshye; kura amabuye n'ibintu binini
Manura imbuto na Rhizobium; tera 4 cm mu butaka, 10 cm mu mirongo ya 30 cm
Shyira umote w'fosifor mu gutera; ntukeneye azote ugeze inoculation
Niza make — amashaza akunda klimati itonutse n'ibintu byumye
Kuramo ibyatsi vuba (ibyumweru 2 na 4); amashaza atsinda cyane n'ibyatsi
Genzura Ascochyta blight n'aphids; kura ibimera birwaye vuba
Sesa igihe imitsi y'epfo iramvura; umeshe ibimera byose hanyuma usase
lentil.tips: Ikunda imisozi hejuru ya 1700 m mu Rwanda.

pomegranate.requirements: Ubutaka bwumye neza · Ubushyuhe 25–38°C · pH 5.5–7.5 · Birhanganira ubuche
steps: Tema imbohe 60×60×60 cm; uzuze n'umote n'urutaka rw'hejuru
Tera inzuki cyangwa amashami akuze 5–6 m zikurikiranye
Shyira kg 10 z'umote mu gutera no mu mwaka wose
Niza inzuki buri cyumweru; ibimera byakuze niza mu gihe cy'ubusumo gusa
Tema kugira ngo ugereshe izuba mu igiti; kura amashami y'epfo buri mwaka
Shyira NPK (200 g) inshuro 3 mu mwaka
Sesa igihe imbuto zitukutse cyane kandi zagira amahirwe yo guturika
pomegranate.tips: Kinga imbuto zingira inkoko ya fruit fly ukoresheje amasaho cyangwa neem.

banana.requirements: Ubutaka buryoshye bwumye neza · Ubushyuhe 15–35°C · pH 5.5–7.0 · Amazi mu mwaka wose
steps: Tema imbohe 60×60×60 cm; shyira kg 10 z'umote hasi
Tera inzuki z'inkoni nziza 3 m zikurikiranye hose
Shyira imisumba (cm 15) inzunguruka buri giti kugira ngo ubike amazi
Shyira umote wa NPK (g 200 ku giti) buri mezi 3
Kura inzuki zose usoze imwe yo kuzimba gusa ku giti
Shora ibiti birebire n'ingobyi za bamba kugira ngo zirinde umuyaga
Sesa igihe imbuto zigura hanyuma ibara ritangira guhinduka (amezi 9–12)
banana.tips: Bika inzuki imwe gusa yo kuzimba ku giti cya nyina nyuma yo gusarura.

mango.requirements: Ubutaka bwimbitse bwumye neza · Ubushyuhe 24–30°C · pH 5.5–7.5 · Gihe cy'ubusumo mu gufurika
steps: Tema imbohe ya 1 m × 1 m × 1 m; zuzuza n'urutaka n'umote wa kg 20
Tera inzuki zakinjijwe uburetwa 10 m zikurikiranye mu ntangiriro y'imvura
Niza inshuro 2 ku cyumweru mu mezi 6 ya mbere; gabanya igihe igiti gikuze
Shyira NPK (g 300) inshuro 3 mu mwaka mu biti bito
Tema buri mwaka kugira ngo ugereshe ibiti; kura amashami apfuye
Genzura mango seed weevil n'anthracnose; fuka mu gihe cy'imitsi igura
Sesa igihe imbuto zihindura ibara kandi zigira ubworoherane buto
mango.tips: Inzuki zakinjijwe uburetwa zitera imbuto vuba kandi zitanga umusaruro mwiza.

grapes.requirements: Ubutaka bwa m'ibyondo bwumye · Ubushyuhe 15–30°C · pH 6.0–7.0 · Igihembwe cy'ubusumo
steps: Shyira imizigo y'inzabibu n'inzoka z'ibiti mbere yo gutera
Tera amashami akuze 1.5 m mu mirongo ya 3 m mu gihe cy'ubusumo
Shora umugozi w'ibiti; kura amashami y'iside mu mwaka wa mbere
Shyira umote n'umote wa potasiyumu mu ntangiriro y'ubusumo
Tema amashami cyane nyuma yo gusarura — siga ibanga 2 ku gatete
Genzura powdery mildew; fuka n'umuti w'ubuhumyi wavanywe
Sesa igihe inzabibu zinozwa cyane kandi ziri na sukari ihagije
grapes.tips: Izuba ryinshi n'umwuka mwiza ni ngombwa kugira ngo ubone imbuto nziza.

watermelon.requirements: Ubutaka bwa m'ibyondo · Ubushyuhe 22–32°C · pH 6.0–7.0 · Ubushyuhe n'izuba
steps: Tegura imirima iraise 30 cm hejuru; shyira umote n'urutaka rwa m'ibyondo
Tera imbuto 3 ku rwobo, 1.5 m zikurikiranye mu mirongo ya 2 m
Sisitamo inzuki nziza 1–2 ku rwobo nyuma y'inzuki
Shyira NPK mu gutera; ongeraho azote mu gihe cy'imizabibu
Niza cyane rimwe ku cyumweru; gabanya amazi igihe imbuto zigura
Funga imyaka mu gitondo igihe ntabunnyiki; genzura aphids
Sesa igihe umugozi hafi y'imbuto uyumye kandi inda iri umuhondo
watermelon.tips: Koresha drip irrigation kugira ngo amakuru y'imbuto atarasaza.

muskmelon.requirements: Ubutaka bwa sandy loam · Ubushyuhe 24–35°C · pH 6.0–7.5 · Ubushyuhe n'izuba ryinshi
steps: Tegura imirima iraise hamwe n'ubutaka bwa m'ibyondo bwumye bwujuje umote
Tera imbuto 2 cm mu butaka, 1 m zikurikiranye mu mirongo ya 1.5 m
Shyira DAP mu gutera na CAN mu gihe cy'imizabibu
Niza kenshi ariko wirinde kugishamikira amakuru cyangwa imbuto
Sisitamo inzuki nziza 1–2 ku rwobo nyuma y'inzuki
Funga imyaka mu gitondo kugira ngo imbuto zishobore gutera; genzura powdery mildew
Sesa igihe imbuto zimuka ibivumba byo kuvumba kandi zivana vuba na murimo
muskmelon.tips: Dindiza imbuto hejuru y'ubutaka ukoresheje inzabibu nto kugira ngo wirinde ubune.

apple.requirements: Ubutaka bwimbitse bwumye · Ubushyuhe 12–22°C · pH 5.5–6.5 · Umusozi hejuru ya 2000 m
steps: Hitamo ahantu h'umusozi hejuru ya 2000 m; irinde ahantu h'urubura
Tema imbohe ya 1 m × 1 m; tera inzuki zakinjijwe uburetwa 6 m zikurikiranye
Niza buri cyumweru mu mwaka wa mbere kugira ngo imizi igere burebure
Shyira umote wa kg 20 buri mwaka na NPK inshuro 2 mu mwaka
Tema kugira ngo igiti gihinduke igishusho cy'igice; kura amashami yo hejuru kenshi
Fuka uduti bwa codling moth n'indwara ya scab mu gihe cy'icyimburiro
Sesa igihe imbuto zigura neza kandi zivana vuba ku giti
apple.tips: Ubwoko bwa Anna na Dorsett Golden bwakora neza mu misozi y'u Rwanda.

orange.requirements: Ubutaka bwimbitse bwumye · Ubushyuhe 15–35°C · pH 5.5–7.0 · Amazi mu mwaka wose
steps: Tema imbohe ya 1 m × 1 m × 0.6 m; zuzuza n'urutaka n'umote wa kg 15
Tera inzuki zakinjijwe uburetwa zemewe 6 m zikurikiranye mu ntangiriro y'imvura
Niza kenshi mu myaka 2 ya mbere; shyira imisumba myinshi inzunguruka igiti
Shyira umote wa NPK w'inyanya buri mezi 3–4 mu mwaka wose
Tema buri mwaka kugira ngo ukure amashami apfuye n'ayanyuranyije
Genzura citrus psylla n'indwara ya greening; kura ibiti birwaye vuba
Sesa igihe imbuto zihinduka imihondo-itukura kandi zinonoka (imyaka 3–5)
orange.tips: Gura gusa inzuki zakinjijwe uburetwa zemewe — zirwanya indwara.

papaya.requirements: Ubutaka buryoshye bwumye · Ubushyuhe 22–32°C · pH 5.5–7.0 · Ahantu hatarimo umuyaga
steps: Tema imbohe 60×60×60 cm; zuzuza n'umote n'urutaka
Tera imbuto 3 ku rwobo, 2.5 m zikurikiranye; sisitamo 1 nyuma y'inzuki
Menya igitsina mu gufurika (amezi 4–5): bika 1 gore ku babibi 10 b'ibitsina by'inyagira
Shyira NPK buri kwezi mu mezi 6 ya mbere, hanyuma buri mezi 2
Shyira imisumba myinshi; niza inshuro 2 ku cyumweru mu gihe cy'ubusumo
Kura vuba ibimera birwaye ring spot virus
Sesa igihe uruhande rumwe rw'imbuto ruhinduka umuhondo (amezi 6–9)
papaya.tips: Subiramo gutera kenshi — ubuzima bw'umusaruro ni imyaka 3–4 gusa.

coconut.requirements: Ubutaka bwa m'ibyondo bw'inkombe · Ubushyuhe 27–32°C · pH 5.0–8.0 · Ubuhehere bwinshi, ahantu hanini
steps: Hitamo imbuto nziza; tereza mu ishyamba ry'inzuki inshuro 3–6 z'amezi
Tera inzuki mu imbohe ya 1 m × 1 m × 1 m, 8 m × 8 m zikurikiranye
Shyira umote wa kg 10 na NPK ya g 500 ku giti inshuro 2 mu mwaka
Niza mu gihe cy'ubusumo; kurinda ubutaka bugire utuzimu bwiza mu mvura
Kura amashami y'ibuye kenshi kugira ngo ugabanya ikibanza cy'uduti
Koresha pheromone traps kugira ngo ugenzure rhinoceros beetle
Sesa igihe imbuto zihindura ibara — imbuto zikura mu myaka 4–6
coconut.tips: Inzuki zikura neza hasi ya 400 m; shyira imisumba myinshi kugira ngo ubike amazi.

cotton.requirements: Ubutaka bwimbitse bwa clay-loam · Ubushyuhe 21–35°C · pH 5.8–8.0 · Gihe kirekire cy'ubusumo
steps: Turuka ubutaka kugeza 30 cm mbere y'imvura; tegura urutaka rworoshye
Tera imbuto 3 cm mu butaka, 25 cm mu mirongo ya 90 cm
Shyira NPK mu gutera; ongeraho azote mu gihe cy'iterwa
Genzura bollworm na whitefly ukoresheje insecticide zemewe
Kuramo ibyatsi inshuro 2–3 mu ntangiriro y'iterwa
Tegereza amababi agwa ubwite cyangwa koresha defoliant yemewe
Fata pamba mu gihe cy'ubusumo gusa; bika mu mifuko myiza n'imeze
cotton.tips: Irinde guhindura na izindi nka malvaceae; suzuma pH mbere yo gutera.

jute.requirements: Ubutaka bwa clay-loam cyangwa silty · Ubushyuhe 24–37°C · pH 6.0–7.5 · Ubuhehere bwinshi
steps: Tegura urutaka rworoshye; sasira imbuto ubwira cyangwa utera mu mirongo ya 25 cm
Sisitamo inzuki 5–8 cm mu murongo nyuma y'ibyumweru 2
Shyira azote mu gutera no nyuma y'ibyumweru 4
Niza niba imvura itahagije — jute isaba mm 500–600 ku gihembwe
Kuramo ibyatsi inshuro 2 mu kwezi kwa mbere; ikurura kuzima vuba
Genzura hairy caterpillar n'indwara ya stem rot mu gihe cy'imvura nyinshi
Sesa mu gufurika (amezi 3–4); shyira mu mazi iminsi 10–20 kugira ngo imyurane
jute.tips: Gutera mu mazi biroroshya inzuki kandi bituma gukurura imyunyu byoroshoka.

coffee.requirements: Ubutaka bw'umuriro w'umusozi · Ubushyuhe 15–24°C · pH 6.0–6.5 · Umusozi, gihe cy'ubusumo mu gufurika
steps: Tera mu imbohe 60×60×60 cm, 2.7 m × 2.7 m; ongeraho ibiti bigukiriza igicucu
Shyira imisumba myinshi (cm 15 z'imishumba y'ikawa cyangwa inyasi) inzunguruka
Shyira NPK (g 200) mu ntangiriro y'imvura; ongeraho urea hagati y'igihembwe
Tema kugira ngo igiti gibe umugoroba umwe mu myaka 2 ya mbere; bika amashami 3–4
Genzura coffee berry borer; koresha BGI traps no gusara vuba
Fata cyangwa bikura katakazo rwinshi ruteye rwa cherry itukutse gusa
Siga, yumvisha, ara, hanyuma umeshe inzabibu ku meza y'imesho iraise
coffee.tips: Injira mu koperative kugira ngo ubone igiciro cy'ikawa y'u Rwanda Fully Washed.
